system.description: Grab something on Reality’s prop table with someone else’s hand. Ask someone to close their eyes and reach out while you roll [quality].

outcomes.success: they retrieve the single object that they want most right now. If the target is a Resonant or Anomaly, their Resonance will attract a hostile Minor Anomaly along with the object (created by the GM). There are no restrictions to the size or specificity of the object. The target must genuinely want it more than anything else in the world. This ability cannot retrieve living things, but may retrieve their byproducts like fruit or eggs.
outcomes.every3rd3:
they retrieve an
additional object related to their desires.
outcomes.failure:
they retrieve the object
most likely to hurt them, and they
see it before it can be hidden.

improvement.question: I figure out what I need...

answer1.text: By trying everything and seeing what sticks.
